findings.title: Missing optional metadata fields in YAML frontmatter
findings.description: The SKILL.md manifest does not include 'allowed-tools', 'compatibility', or 'license'. While these fields are optional per the agent skills specification, their absence reduces transparency and trust. Missing 'allowed-tools' means no declared restrictions on agent tools, but the script uses `subprocess.run` (which would require Bash tool) and file I/O (Read/Write/Glob). Without declarations, no violation can be claimed, but this is an informational finding.
findings.remediation: Add 'allowed-tools' (e.g., Bash, Python, Read, Glob), 'compatibility', and 'license' to the YAML frontmatter for better clarity and security governance.
